title: Senior Business Development Manager at L&T Realty Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Senior Business Development Manager at L&T Realty Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
We at L&T Realty Advisory Limited are looking for an experienced Business Development Manager based out of Navi Mumbai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About L&T Realty Advisory Limited:
L&T Realty Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Title Search

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with L&T Realty Advisory Limited!
